news.headline: Halle Berry and health experts team up for MasterClass on menopause stigma, offering strategies to thrive.
news.summary: Attendees will be provided with guidance on symptom management, practical tactics for improvement, and will have the opportunity to gain insight from compelling personal narratives, including that of Respin founder and prominent menopause supporter, Halle Berry. The event is set to take place in San Francisco on December 5, 2024. MasterClass, the featured streaming service for the event, will offer valuable expertise on these topics and much more.

news.headline: Avelo Airlines will add nonstop flights to Myrtle Beach, SC, and Wilmington, NC from MHT in April 2025.
news.summary: Beginning in April 2025, Avelo Airlines is set to introduce flights to Myrtle Beach, South Carolina, and Wilmington, North Carolina. The news was unveiled by Manchester-Boston Regional Airport in Manchester, New Hampshire on December 5, 2024. This expansion will provide travelers in the region with access to these popular destinations.

news.headline: BrightNight appoints Logan Granger as CTO to drive rapid growth. Granger brings decades of leadership experience.
news.summary: BrightNight, a leading global renewable energy provider, has appointed Logan Granger as the newest addition to their team in West Palm Beach, Florida on December 5, 2024. With his vast experience in technical leadership spanning decades, Granger is set to bring a wealth of knowledge to the organization. BrightNight focuses on delivering sustainable and reliable energy solutions on a global scale. This announcement marks a significant milestone for BrightNight as they continue their mission to innovate and provide clean energy solutions to a wide audience.

news.headline: Neiman Marcus Group recognizes employees creating holiday magic at 1,000+ stores, celebrating behind-the-scenes efforts.
news.summary: The luxury retailer Neiman Marcus Group provides a unique insight into the holiday preparations at Neiman Marcus and Bergdorf Goodman. This includes a glimpse behind the scenes at the individuals responsible for crafting the holiday magic. The information was shared on December 5, 2024, without specifying the source. This initiative reflects the company's longstanding commitment to delivering exceptional festive experiences.

news.headline: Centrical reveals winners of 2024 Customer SELECT Awards for frontline employee performance innovation across industries.
news.summary: Today in New York, Centrical announced the winners of the 2024 Customer SELECT Awards, honoring those making a significant impact on frontline employee performance and innovation. The awards shine a light on leaders and organizations driving change across various industries.

news.headline: Sovos processed taxes on 300M transactions during Black Friday & Cyber Monday, 92% growth with 100% uptime.
news.summary: Sovos, a leading compliance company, revealed exceptional results during the recent Black Friday and Cyber Monday sales events. The company successfully managed tax processing for almost 300 million items in just these two days out of the 16+ Billion items processed annually. This highlighted the impressive scalability and dependability of its worldwide tax determination system. On Black Friday, Sovos saw a notable 92% surge in transaction count, while Cyber Monday followed a similar upward trajectory.

news.headline: Appriss Retail introduces new SecureGPT feature utilizing generative AI technology for faster loss prevention efforts.
news.summary: In Irvine, California, leading data and analytics solutions provider, Appriss Retail, has announced the launch of SecureGPT within its Secure exception-based reporting (EBR) platform. This new feature utilizes generative AI technology to enhance the retail industry's ability to reduce retail losses, combat return and claim fraud, and deliver a more streamlined consumer experience. SecureGPT introduces a retail-specific natural language search function, significantly reducing the time required for loss prevention efforts. This innovation is poised to revolutionize the sector with its advanced capabilities.

news.headline: Americans overspent $200 million on weight loss medications this year, despite limited insurance coverage. Interest in drugs like Mounjaro and Ozempic remains high.
news.summary: In Santa Monica, California, GoodRx, a notable prescription savings platform listed on Nasdaq as GDRX, unveiled a Weight Loss Medications Tracker. This new tracker offers insights into fill trends and expenditure patterns for weight loss medications nationwide. Despite restricted insurance coverage and significant out-of-pocket expenses, there is a sustained interest in popular weight loss drugs like Mounjaro, Ozempic, Wegovy, and Zepbound. The tracker sheds light on the continuous demand for these medications despite financial obstacles, indicating a strong market for weight loss drugs in the U.S.

news.headline: Bitcoin reaches over $100,000 following appointment of pro-crypto SEC pick by Trump.
Atlas Van Lines releases 2024 Migration Patterns Study on Nov. 1, 2023, - Oct. 31, 2024. Survey of 1,135 consumers conducted.
news.summary: Atlas® Van Lines from Evansville, Indiana, has published its 2024 Migration Patterns Study, which tracks customer moves across state lines, provincial borders, and international boundaries. This year’s study covers relocations between Nov. 1, 2023, and Oct. 31, 2024, pinpointing origin and destination locations. In a new addition for 2024, Atlas surveyed 1,135 relocated consumers to delve into the reasons driving their moves.

news.headline: Torchy’s Tacos partners with SoundHound's voice AI for phone ordering at 130 locations, catering to customized orders.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, SoundHound AI, Inc (Stock symbol: SOUN), a prominent player in voice artificial intelligence, has teamed up with Torchy's Tacos, a popular taco chain famous for its "Damn Good Tacos." They have introduced SoundHound's advanced voice AI Smart Ordering system across all 130 Torchy's outlets. This product is equipped with the entire Torchy's Tacos menu, allowing it to comprehend highly personalized orders efficiently. It is a significant collaboration between these two entities in the restaurant tech sector.

news.headline: Jazwares collaborates with Baked by Melissa to create a delicious miniature cupcake collection based on Squishmallows.
news.summary: A collaboration between Jazwares and Baked by Melissa has been announced, bringing fans an exclusive collection of bite-sized Squishmallows inspired by the popular mini cupcake brand. The collaboration aims to combine the cuteness of Squishmallows with the delicious flavors of Baked by Melissa cupcakes. This partnership will introduce a range of miniature Squishmallows that promise to be as delightful as they are tasty. Expect a fun and playful collection launching soon for all fans to enjoy.

news.headline: Factor donates 10 refrigerated vans to hunger relief in Aurora, IL and Goodyear, AZ to aid food distribution efforts.
news.summary: In Aurora, Illinois and Goodyear, Arizona, Factor, a top ready-to-eat delivery service in the U.S., revealed a generous act by donating 10 refrigerated vans to hunger relief organizations. These vans will benefit communities in both locations, where Factor runs its operations. The company collaborates with food banks and partner agencies within the Feeding America network to distribute ready-to-eat meals and surplus ingredients to individuals experiencing food insecurity. The vans donated are specifically designed for transporting fresh and perishable goods, enhancing their ability to efficiently deliver food to those in need.

news.headline: FlavorSum introduces 2025 Seasonal Flavor Guide, aiding food and beverage developers in tracking seasonal flavor trends.
news.summary: A flavor producer based in Kalamazoo, Michigan, FlavorSum has announced the release of its 2025 Seasonal Flavor Guide tailored for food and beverage developers. This latest edition, the third of its kind, is the result of cooperation between FlavorSum's insights professionals, flavorists, and application scientists. The guide offers a comprehensive look at current seasonal flavor trends spanning across all four seasons - Spring, Summer, Fall, and Winter. Available in a digital format, the guide serves as a source of inspiration for seasonal product development in various categories.

news.headline: ICSC's 2024 post-Thanksgiving survey: 207M consumers shopped, data from Nov 29 and Dec 2, 2024 with over 1,000 samples each.
news.summary: A survey conducted by ICSC gathered consumer shopping behavior data for the Thanksgiving weekend in 2024. The survey included a demographically representative sample of 1,009 participants on November 29, 2024, and 1,011 participants on December 2, 2024. The findings indicated that consumers are continuing to exhibit robust spending habits, with a noticeable increase in shopper activity during the Thanksgiving weekend.

news.headline: PensionBee launches app in US allowing users to merge old 401(k) into IRA; partnership with SSGA for investments.
news.summary: A rapidly expanding IRA provider, PensionBee, has unveiled a new app in New York. This app empowers users to consolidate previous workplace 401(k) accounts into an IRA and grants convenient access to account details comparable to traditional banking services. Through a collaboration with State Street Global Advisors (SSGA), PensionBee offers clients access to various investment portfolios tied to SSGA's model portfolios, catering exclusively to consumers.

news.headline: T-Mobile introduces new 5G Home Internet & Small Business plans starting at $35/month, ensuring price lock for customers.
news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington, T-Mobile, listed as TMUS on NASDAQ, has revealed three fresh 5G Home Internet and Small Business Internet choices, with rates starting at $35 per month with AutoPay and a voice line included. The company, currently the fastest expanding internet provider in the United States, has introduced these new plans with additional benefits, improved performance, and a Price Lock guarantee. This Price Lock ensures that customers will not see an increase in their 5G internet plan cost for the duration of their subscription, subject to exclusions such as taxes and fees.

news.headline: Hive wins DoD contract for deepfake detection, aiding national security. 2-year deal with DIU to combat AI threats.
news.summary: A Department of Defense (DoD) contract has been awarded to Hive, a prominent enterprise AI solutions provider, for deepfake detection of video, image, and audio content. This collaboration signifies a major advancement in enhancing national security and countering the growing threats of synthetic media and AI-generated disinformation. The two-year contract with the Defense Innovation Unit (DIU) aims to bolster intelligence capabilities and safeguard against malicious manipulation of media. This initiative marks a crucial step in addressing the evolving landscape of technological risks.

news.headline: PPG installs 1.5MW of on-site solar panels in Caivano, Italy, cutting 390 metric tons of CO2 emissions yearly.
news.summary: In Caivano, Italy, PPG (NYSE:PPG) has finished installing a 1.5 megawatt solar system at its facility to help achieve its 2030 greenhouse gas emissions reduction goals. The project, done in collaboration with Grastim, is expected to lower CO2 emissions by around 390 metric tons per year. This initiative is part of the company's partnership with Grastim, which specializes in high-efficiency energy solutions. This solar installation at the Caivano facility is a significant step towards meeting PPG's emission targets and promoting sustainable energy practices.

news.headline: Global sanitary napkin disposal machine market to reach US$ 3.1 billion by 2034 with a 4.2% CAGR growth rate, driven by demand for hygiene and sustainable waste management. Key players include Hospeco, Bobrick Washroom Equipment Inc., Rubbermaid Commercial Products, Bradley Corporation, Frost Products Ltd., ASI, TCS Hygiene, and Vectair Systems. Companies are focused on product innovation for increased efficiency and eco-friendliness in public spaces.
news.summary: The global sanitary napkin disposal machine market was worth US$2.0 billion in 2023 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 4.2% to reach US$3.1 billion by 2034. These machines provide a safe and hygienic solution for the disposal of sanitary napkins, crucial for reducing the spread of bacteria. Improper disposal poses health and environmental risks, particularly in rural areas lacking waste management systems. Key players in the market include Hospeco, Bobrick Washroom Equipment Inc., Rubbermaid Commercial Products, among others, focusing on innovation to meet the demand for efficient and eco-friendly solutions. These machines are increasingly popular in public washrooms, schools, and healthcare facilities.

news.headline: Global automatic plastic recycling market valued at US$15.0 Bn in 2023, projected to reach US$40.7 Bn by 2034 growing at CAGR of 7.6% due to adoption of advanced technologies and stringent regulations promoting sustainability.
news.summary: The global automatic plastic recycling market was valued at US$15.0 billion in 2023, with a projected CAGR of 7.6% from 2024 to 2034, reaching an estimated value of US$40.7 billion by 2034. This market growth is attributed to the increasing adoption of advanced sorting and processing technologies, driven by stringent regulations for sustainable plastic waste management. Automatic plastic recycling systems utilize technologies like NIR sorting, robotics, and self-cleaning filters to efficiently process plastic waste, ensuring accurate polymer identification and high-quality recycled materials. Key drivers for market growth include technological advancements in recycling machinery, rise in investment in recycling infrastructure, and stringent environmental regulations promoting recycling efforts. The incorporation of automated systems has made large-scale recycling more viable for industries such as packaging, automotive, and construction. The European Union's new packaging regulations and global trends towards extended producer responsibility frameworks are expected to further drive the demand for automated recycling solutions.

news.headline: Sollis Health secures $33M in Series B led by Foresite Capital for nationwide expansion and new clinic locations.
news.summary: An injection of funding has been secured by Sollis Health to support its nationwide growth, enhance product development, and improve member services. This includes establishing new clinic sites in key areas such as Silicon Valley, Miami, and Texas. The funding, announced on December 5, 2024, will fuel these expansion efforts as the company continues to lead the way as the premier concierge medicine provider, offering round-the-clock access to its members.

news.headline: Sunwest Bank appoints Jason Watson as SVP, Utah Regional President with 20+ years experience. (Total characters: 89)
news.summary: Jason Watson has recently been appointed as the Senior Vice President and Utah Regional President at Sunwest Bank, bringing with him more than two decades of experience in the banking industry. The announcement was made in Sandy, Utah on December 5, 2024. In his new position, Watson will oversee the growth and management of all banking operations in the region.

news.headline: 4.7B robocalls to U.S. consumers in Nov, 3.7% decrease from Oct but 5% up from Nov 2023 - PRNewswire.
news.summary: In December 5, 2024, in Irvine, California, it was reported that there was a 3.7% decrease in the number of robocalls received by U.S. consumers, totaling approximately 4.7 billion in November. Despite the decline from October, there was a 5% increase compared to November 2023. November's numbers mirrored those of October, demonstrating a consistent trend in the volume of robocalls being reported.

news.headline: KinderCare opens scholarship applications for 2025-2026 academic year to support alumni in college education.
news.summary: A scholarship has been introduced to assist alumni affiliated with the KinderCare family of brands in their endeavors to attain a college education. The application process for the 2025-2026 KinderCare Learning Companies Kids scholarship is now open. The company, based in Lake Oswego, Oregon, announced the initiative on December 5, 2024. The scholarship aims to provide financial support to individuals associated with KinderCare brands in pursuing higher education. This opportunity is made possible by KinderCare Learning Companies™, a publicly traded company listed as NYSE: KLC.

news.headline: New BISSELL Steam Shot OmniReach offers chemical-free cleaning with ten tools for tough messes. From Grand Rapids, Mich., launched Dec. 5, 2024.
news.summary: A state-of-the-art handheld steam cleaner has been recently introduced, offering an environmentally-friendly cleaning solution. This innovative device, based in Grand Rapids, Michigan, offers ten specialized tools and attachments designed to effectively eliminate challenging and inaccessible messes and stains. Launched by BISSELL, a renowned homecare brand, this product is ideal for the upcoming holiday season.

news.headline: ShiftMed, a workforce technology leader, appoints two industry experts to drive strategic growth. Expanding healthcare solutions.
news.summary: Today, ShiftMed, a provider of innovative workforce solutions for healthcare organizations, introduced new leaders with significant healthcare experience to their team. The company, based in McLean, Virginia, revealed this update on December 5, 2024. ShiftMed aims to improve its mission of offering flexible workforce solutions through advanced technology.

news.headline: New CEO Betsy Frost joins Q Mixers, leading premium mixer company, to enhance brand; sets vision for future.
news.summary: In Brooklyn, New York, on December 5, 2024, Q Mixers, a top premium mixer company in America known for enhancing every drink, cocktail, and mocktail, disclosed the selection of Betsy Frost as its new Chief Executive Officer. With a background in the Consumer Packaged Goods (CPG) sector, Frost brings her wealth of experience to lead the company forward.

news.headline: Muon Space has been awarded a contract by Space Force to enhance space-based environmental monitoring with an advanced EO/IR instrument.
news.summary: A state-of-the-art multispectral EO/IR device has been developed to meet Defense requirements for cloud analysis and theater weather imaging. Muon Space, a Space Systems Provider based in Mountain View, California, announced the creation of this advanced instrument on December 5, 2024. The company specializes in designing, constructing, and managing custom low-earth orbit missions for various applications.

news.headline: Equities may continue rallying in 2025; RBC suggests economic growth and earnings key. Fed policy changes possible.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, RBC Wealth Management released their Global Insight 2025 Outlook, indicating that the ongoing global equity markets surge observed in the past couple of years could extend into 2025. However, this continuation is contingent on favorable economic expansion and promising corporate profit performances. This forecast underscores the necessity of sustained growth and solid earnings reports to support the market's upward trajectory.

news.headline: Celleste Bio secures $4.5M in seed funding to scale cell-cultured cocoa production, led by Supply Change Capital.
news.summary: Celleste Bio, a cocoa-tech startup based in Tel Aviv, Israel and New York, recently completed a seed financing round on December 5, 2024. The funding totaled $4.5 million and was spearheaded by Supply Change Capital. Notably, Mondelēz International's SnackFutures Ventures also participated in this investment round.

news.headline: 79% of manufacturers plan to use AI to combat high-skilled labor shortage, aiding  in augmenting and democratizing work.
news.summary: The integration of artificial intelligence is poised to enhance and broaden access to high-skilled tasks in light of the ongoing shortage of skilled workers. This development is expected to provide opportunities for individuals to engage in complex work processes.

news.headline: Triller Group Inc. (Nasdaq: ILLR) to hold online Investor Day on Dec 18, 2024 at 10AM PT to share vision and growth strategies.
news.summary: Triller Group Inc. (Nasdaq: ILLR) will hold its Investor Day on December 18, 2024, at 10AM Pacific Time. The event, hosted online, offers investors and stakeholders a chance to engage with the Company's leadership, focusing on strategic vision, financial updates, and growth plans.

news.headline: Mullen secures order for 10 Class 3 EV trucks from Associated Coffee, serving 5,000 Bay Area customers through Papé Group.
news.summary: The first order of vehicles consists of 10 Class 3 electric trucks and was completed by Mullen's latest franchise dealer, Papé Group.

news.headline: NANO Nuclear signs MoU with Togo for peaceful atomic energy use, aiding in socio-economic development.
news.summary: In West Africa, NANO Nuclear plans to investigate the safe utilization of atomic energy to spur sustainable socio-economic growth. The exploration aims to harness nuclear technology for peaceful purposes, such as powering industries, advancing medical treatments, and enhancing agricultural output. This initiative could potentially generate job opportunities and contribute to the overall development of the region.

news.headline: Qualigen Therapeutics regains compliance with Nasdaq's minimum bid price and equity requirements. Compliance met with Nasdaq rules.
news.summary: Qualigen Therapeutics, based in Carlsbad, CA, revealed today that it has received official confirmation from The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC regarding its compliance status. The company, listed as QLGN on the NASDAQ, has successfully met the minimum bid price requirement as outlined in Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2) and the stockholders’ equity requirement specified in Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(b)(1). This marks a significant achievement for Qualigen as it reassures its standing in the market. The announcement was made on Dec. 05, 2024.

news.headline: Mesa Air Group plans to increase aircraft utilization rates starting in Jan 2025, expecting significant growth.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, Mesa Air Group, Inc. revealed plans to noticeably boost their daily aircraft utilization rates starting in January 2025. The company, listed as (NASDAQ: MESA), is based in Phoenix. This strategic decision indicates Mesa's intention to enhance operational efficiency and maximize the use of their aircraft fleet moving forward.

news.headline: Cemtrex to integrate AI armed person detection feature in Vicon NEXT Cameras, set for release in Q1 2025.
news.summary: A powerful AI analytics technology capable of identifying armed individuals in surveillance videos will be integrated into the upcoming Vicon NEXT cameras set to debut in the first quarter of 2025. This disruptive innovation aims to enhance security measures by automatically detecting and alerting the presence of weapons in real-time footage. The advanced feature is expected to significantly improve monitoring capabilities and further bolster safety protocols. The integration of this cutting-edge AI system into Vicon NEXT cameras represents a major leap forward in surveillance technology, with the potential to revolutionize threat detection and prevention strategies.

news.headline: AMP Robotics raises $91 million in Series D funding led by Congruent Ventures for AI-powered waste sortation.
news.summary: In Denver, AMP Robotics Corp. has secured $91 million in corporate equity through a Series D financing round led by Congruent Ventures. Current and new investors such as Sequoia Capital, XN, Blue Earth Capital, Liberty Mutual Investments, CalSTRS, Wellington Management, Range Ventures, and Tao Capital Partners also participated in the funding. AMP is known for its AI-powered sortation services for the waste and recycling sector, allowing for efficient operations on a large scale.

news.headline: Intuit introduces AI-driven tax platform for personal and small business filers, guarantees speed and maximum refunds.
news.summary: Intuit Inc., a leading financial technology platform traded on Nasdaq under the symbol INTU, based in Mountain View, California, unveiled its latest tax platform features for individuals and small businesses. The company, known for its products like Intuit TurboTax, Credit Karma, QuickBooks, and Mailchimp, introduced innovative tools and enhanced integrations on its AI-powered expert platform. These updates promise users a swift and precise tax filing process tailored to their needs, ensuring quick processing and securing the highest possible tax refunds. Intuit is focused on providing a hassle-free experience for its customers through its advanced technology solutions.

news.headline: Forrester enhances Forrester Wave™, guide for tech buyers. Updates simplify buyer selection process. Clients can shortlist vendors and compare solutions with new interactive experience.
news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, Forrester (Nasdaq: FORR) has unveiled significant improvements to the Forrester Wave™, which serves as a go-to resource for purchasers assessing technologies and services in the market. Exclusively accessible to Forrester Decisions and Forrester Market Insights customers, the upgrades aim to streamline the buyer selection journey with a fresh interactive platform. This feature empowers clients to efficiently narrow down potential vendors, engage in direct product comparisons, and ultimately finalize their procurement choices.

news.headline: Mitek launches Digital Fraud Defender to combat deepfakes and AI-enabled fraud, targeted at financial institutions and enterprises.
news.summary: In San Diego, Mitek Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: MITK) unveiled Digital Fraud Defender (DFD), a cutting-edge solution to protect digital identity verification from AI-driven fraud tactics. The suite is tailored for financial institutions, fintech, online gaming firms, and remote verification-dependent enterprises. This technology aims to combat the rising threat of cyber fraud in various sectors by providing a comprehensive defense mechanism. Leveraging multiple layers of security, DFD offers an advanced approach to safeguarding digital identity verification processes.

news.headline: Apex Fintech and Advyzon enhance partnership with Advyzon Investment Management, providing integrated investment solutions for advisors.
news.summary: Dallas-based Apex Fintech Solutions Inc. and Advyzon, a technology platform for financial advisors, are excited to announce the expansion of their partnership. The collaboration will focus on integrating with Advyzon Investment Management (AIM), an investment provider under Advyzon. This will allow advisors to utilize AIM’s services more effectively. The partnership aims to enhance the global investment ecosystem.

news.headline: Bitdefender strengthens XDR capabilities with Business Applications sensor for cloud data security.
news.summary: Bitdefender has unveiled improvements to its GravityZone XDR platform by introducing the new Business Applications sensor. This enhancement aims to bolster the platform’s capabilities and ensure comprehensive protection. The addition of the sensor will provide businesses with greater visibility and control over their systems and applications. This move highlights Bitdefender’s commitment to enhancing its offerings and providing top-notch cybersecurity solutions. The company’s focus on innovation and customer satisfaction is evident in the continuous development of its products. This update is expected to benefit businesses looking to enhance their security posture and mitigate risks effectively.

news.headline: Forethought sets new standard in CX with 1 billion monthly interactions, leads in integrating AI with human-centric support.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Forethought, a prominent provider of Agentic AI for improving customer experiences, has reached a milestone by handling more than one billion customer interactions every month. This achievement underscores Forethought's position as an industry frontrunner in reshaping customer experience through the seamless fusion of AI-powered automation and personalized human support. The introduction of Agentic AI by Forethought marks a substantial advancement in enhancing customer service beyond conventional methods. Unlike most AI solutions in the market that primarily depend on retrieval-based approaches, Forethought's Agentic AI is designed to elevate customer conversations to new heights.

news.headline: Motive introduces advanced fraud controls on its Motive Card, detecting $250,000 in 1,200 unauthorized transactions in 30 days.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Motive introduced advanced fraud prevention tools through its AI-powered Integrated Operations Platform. These new features proactively detect fraudulent activities before they occur. During a 30-day trial, the system successfully identified over $250,000 linked to more than 1,200 unauthorized transactions. The Motive Card stands out as the sole fuel card fully incorporated into a fleet management system. The enhanced fraud controls leverage telematics data from the Motive platform, empowering fleet managers with comprehensive oversight.

news.headline: Insight partners with AWS to enhance cloud services for clients. Agreement focuses on managing cloud roadmap and AI strategy.
news.summary: Insight Enterprises (NASDAQ:NSIT) based in Chandler, Arizona, has recently disclosed a fresh Strategic Collaboration Agreement (SCA) with Amazon Web Services, Inc. (AWS). This alliance aims to aid customers in efficiently steering their cloud journey, encompassing data and AI tactics. The SCA cements Insight’s position as a prominent supplier of cloud services, data management, artificial intelligence technologies, cybersecurity, and intelligent edge solutions within various cloud networks. This collaboration emphasizes the growing trend of organizations turning to cloud services for their operations.

news.headline: Majesco ranked #13 in Top 100 Software Companies of 2024 and named #1 InsurTech leader. Impressive achievements and recognition in industry.
news.summary: In Morristown, New Jersey, Majesco, a prominent provider of cloud intelligent insurance solutions for insurance companies, has been named one of The Software Report’s Top 100 Software Companies of 2024. This acknowledgment highlights Majesco's excellence in product innovation, customer satisfaction, and industry leadership, positioning it as a key player among software firms driving technological advancements. The Software Report is highly respected in the industry for identifying top-performing companies.

news.headline: SHIZA introduces Developer Suite leveraging Individual Learning Models for AI ownership and monetization.
news.summary: In New York, SHIZA has unveiled its Developer Suite, merging AI and Web3 innovations. This offering serves as a vital tool for shifting towards an intelligence-powered economy. The key component of their cutting-edge technology lineup is the Individual Learning Models (ILMs), which offers individuals the ability to own and make money from AI in light of the ongoing upheavals in traditional job markets. By employing a platform that supports various LLMs, SHIZA's Developer Suite democratizes AI creation, empowering all individuals to engage in this field.

news.headline: iCapital sponsors Swiss skier Stefan Rogentin, ranked 4th in Super-G, 16th in Downhill, and 18th overall in FIS World Cup.
news.summary: In a joint statement from New York and Zurich, iCapital1, a leading global fintech platform focused on expanding access to alternative investments for the wealth and asset management sectors, revealed a new brand ambassador sponsorship. The chosen ambassador is the celebrated Swiss World Cup Ski racing athlete, Stefan Rogentin, who achieved impressive rankings in the last season. Rogentin secured 4th place in Super-G, 16th in Downhill, and overall 18th in the FIS World Cup standings. Moreover, he proudly represented Switzerland as a member of the Swiss Ski National Team at the 2022 Winter Olympics in Be.
